title: The City of the Great Pit
overview: While exploring the Abyss, Riko comes across something she has never seen before. How does this new discovery impact her?

title: Resurrection Festival
overview: Riko and Reg find out more about their past but the question still remains, who or what exactly is Reg?

title: Departure
overview: Reg goes on his first cave raid! Meanwhile, Riko makes preparations to go into the abyss to find her mother.

title: The Edge of the Abyss
overview: Riko and Reg start their adventure into the Abyss, while there they run into an unexpected familiar face.

title: Incinerator
overview: Riko and Reg descend into the Forest of Temptation. What new dangers will they find laying in wait for them there?

title: Seeker Camp
overview: Reg and Riko make it to the Seeker Camp where they meet Ozen the Immovable, the person who saved Riko all those years ago. But there is more to Ozen than meets the eye.

title: The Unmovable Sovereign
overview: Ozen reveals more about the Abyss as well as the truth behind Riko's origins. What will happen when Ozen shows her true colors?

title: Survival Training
overview: Ozen tasks Riko and Reg to survive alone outside the Seeker Camp. Do they come out alive and unscathed? Or does the Abyss have a dirty trick up its sleeve?

title: The Great Fault
overview: Reg and Riko continue their descent after they leave Ozen's Seeker Camp. Riko's mettle is tested as Reg passes out and she has to fend for herself.

title: Poison and the Curse
overview: Reg and Riko run into trouble deep in the fourth layer where they meet an interesting creature, but are they friend or foe?

title: Nanachi
overview: Nanachi sends Reg on a mission to find certain items that could possibly save Riko. Meanwhile, Nanachi reveals a little more about themself.

title: The True Nature of the Curse
overview: Nanachi shows Reg the truth about the Abyss. Meanwhile, Riko is still recovering from her injuries when she has a strange dream.

title: The Challengers
overview: Nanachi and Mitty's past is revealed. How did they become what they are and who is responsible for it? Meanwhile, Riko is on the mend after her injuries.

title: The Compass Pointed to the Darkness
overview: An old man speaks of a golden city that lies within a devouring abyss somewhere in uncharted waters. One explorer may be the key to finding both.

title: Capital of the Unreturned
overview: Riko, Reg and Nanachi take their first steps into the sixth layer. Both wonders and dangers await the trio, but they are unaware they are being watched.

title: Village of the Hollows
overview: Riko couldn’t have known the consequences of her words, but she sealed the villager’s fate as soon as she acknowledged Meinya was priceless. The Balancing has begun…

title: Friend
overview: Faputa and Reg once knew each other, but Reg cannot remember her at all now. Meanwhile, Nanachi is stunned by news so unexpected that it should be impossible to believe.

title: Concealment
overview: Some say there’s a secret hidden deep within the dark cave at the edge of the village. Villagers don’t investigate and stay far away, but Riko isn’t a villager.

title: The Luring
overview: The villagers must lure abyssal fauna into the village to hunt them. But when one creature proves too much to handle, Riko needs to help the villagers defend their home.

title: The Cradle of Desire
overview: What happened to the expedition? The truth is far more tragic and horrifying than anyone could have imagined.

title: The Form the Wish Takes
overview: They had their reasons for descending into that infernal pit. They found damnation and salvation in equal measure.

title: The Return
overview: Faputa can help Reg save Nanachi, but everything has a price. In exchange, Reg must help her enter the village.

title: All That You Gather
overview: The reckoning comes, but Reg is too kind and foolish to be a bystander.

title: Value
overview: The village’s membrane has been breached, and through the gap floods chaos itself. But as attackers enter from without, aid comes from within.

title: Gold
overview: In the end, everything comes full circle.
